meta.compliance_deadline_basis: 24 months from March 2026 issuance for MFBs

overall_rating.summary_paragraph: Sunrise MFB faces HIGH compliance risk. Partial AML system covers only 2 of 12 standards. No transaction monitoring, case management, or regulatory reporting automation exists. 8 Critical Gaps identified. March 2028 deadline requires urgent platform deployment.
overall_rating.sector_context_note: MFBs with FX/remittance and PEP exposure require real-time monitoring capabilities under 5.5 and 5.6.

scorecard.regulatory_context_box: MFBs must submit roadmap by 10 June 2026 and achieve full compliance by March 2028 per BSD/DIR/PUB/LAB/019/002.

gap_analysis_intro: Sunrise MFB has 8 Critical Gaps and 2 Gaps Identified across the 12 Baseline Standards.

standards.title: Automated AML Solution
standards.finding: Partial system covers only CDD/KYC and sanctions/PEP. 5.1 requires all 8 functions including transaction monitoring, risk assessment, case management, and regulatory reporting — all absent.
standards.required_action: Deploy full AML platform covering all 8 mandatory functions before roadmap submission.

standards.title: Customer Due Diligence
standards.finding: CDD/KYC function automated with confirmed BVN/NIN integration. Meets 5.2 requirements for identity verification and ongoing monitoring of retail deposit and credit customers.
standards.required_action: Maintain current CDD capability and integrate with future transaction monitoring system.

standards.title: Sanctions & PEP Screening
standards.finding: Automated sanctions and PEP screening in place. Critical for MFB with documented PEP exposure and cross-border FX operations. Meets 5.3 real-time screening requirements.
standards.required_action: Ensure screening integrates with case management once ECM deployed under 5.7.

standards.title: Risk Assessment & Profiling
standards.finding: No automated risk assessment function. 5.4 requires dynamic customer risk scoring based on transaction patterns, product usage, and geographic exposure — mandatory for MFBs with multi-state footprint.
standards.required_action: Deploy risk assessment engine with dynamic scoring before March 2027.

standards.title: Transaction Monitoring
standards.finding: No transaction monitoring system exists. 5.5 requires real-time multi-scenario monitoring for deposits, loans, and FX/remittance flows. Critical for MFB processing cross-border transactions.
standards.required_action: Deploy real-time transaction monitoring via RegPort before roadmap submission deadline.

standards.title: Fraud Monitoring
standards.finding: No fraud monitoring capability. 5.6 requires real-time fraud detection for mobile app and USSD channels. MFB's digital delivery channels create material fraud exposure.
standards.required_action: Deploy RegGuard for real-time fraud monitoring across branch, mobile, and USSD.

standards.title: Case Management
standards.finding: No enterprise case management system. 5.7 requires ECM with Maker-Checker workflow, full audit trail, and escalation protocols for alerts from sanctions, transaction monitoring, and fraud systems.
standards.required_action: Deploy RegComply ECM with Maker-Checker and immutable audit trail by Q3 2026.

standards.title: Regulatory Reporting
standards.finding: No automated regulatory reporting. 5.8 requires automated STR, CTR, SAR, and FTR generation. MFB with FX/remittance must file goAML reports — manual processes create filing risk.
standards.required_action: Automate STR/CTR/SAR/FTR generation and goAML integration via RegPort by Q4 2026.

standards.title: Audit Trail & Internal Audit
standards.finding: Annual internal audit frequency insufficient. 5.9 requires AML internal audit at least twice yearly. No confirmed immutable audit trail for AML system configurations and alert decisions.
standards.required_action: Increase AML audit to semi-annual and deploy immutable audit trail via RegComply.

standards.title: System Integration
standards.finding: No confirmed integration architecture. 5.10 requires bidirectional real-time integration between AML platform, core banking, and KYC systems for deposits, loans, and FX transactions.
standards.required_action: Design and implement real-time API integration architecture by Q2 2026.

standards.title: Data Security & Privacy
standards.finding: No confirmed MFA, encryption, or NDPA compliance evidence. 5.11 requires documented data security controls for customer PII and transaction data across branch, mobile, and USSD channels.
standards.required_action: Document MFA, encryption, and NDPA compliance controls before CBN examination readiness.

standards.title: Management Reporting
standards.finding: No automated management reporting. 5.12 requires real-time dashboards for alert volumes, case closure rates, and risk trends. Board and MLRO require monthly AML performance visibility.
standards.required_action: Deploy real-time dashboards and customisable reports via RegComply by Q4 2026.

governance_assessment.intro: Sunrise MFB has 4 of 10 governance controls in place — Partial governance framework.

items.control: Formal change control for AML configurations
AML training programme with documented records

priority_actions.title: CBN Roadmap Template Submission
priority_actions.body: Sunrise MFB must complete and submit the CBN Implementation Roadmap Template to the Compliance Department by 10 June 2026. Blank or incomplete submissions are treated as non-compliance. OPEX Consulting can complete this template using this report's findings.

priority_actions.title: AML Platform Selection and Procurement
priority_actions.body: Select and procure full AML platform covering transaction monitoring, risk assessment, case management, and regulatory reporting. Partial system creates 8 Critical Gaps. RegTech365 suite (RegPort, RegGuard, RegComply) addresses all 12 standards. Delay risks March 2028 non-compliance.

priority_actions.title: Vendor Management Policy Development
priority_actions.body: Develop and board-approve Vendor/Third-Party Management Policy before AML platform deployment. 5.11 requires documented vendor risk assessment and oversight. OPEX Consulting can draft policy aligned with CBN expectations and ISO 27001 controls.

priority_actions.title: AML Training Programme with Documented Records
priority_actions.body: Deploy AML training programme with documented records for all staff handling deposits, loans, and FX transactions. 5.9 requires evidence of competency. RegLearn provides training with automated record-keeping for CBN examination readiness.

priority_actions.title: Semi-Annual AML Internal Audit Coverage
priority_actions.body: Increase AML internal audit frequency from annual to semi-annual. 5.9 requires at least twice-yearly coverage. Annual audits create Gap Identified status. OPEX Consulting can design audit programme and provide interim audit support.

roadmap.intro: Four-phase roadmap delivers full compliance by March 2028 for Sunrise MFB.

phases.title: Foundation & Roadmap Submission
phases.objectives: Establish governance baseline and submit CBN roadmap.
phases.key_deliverables: CBN roadmap template submission, vendor management policy, AML governance framework, alert review SLA documentation, data retention policy, training programme design

phases.title: Platform Selection & Integration Design
phases.objectives: Select AML platform and design integration architecture.
phases.key_deliverables: AML platform procurement (RegPort, RegGuard, RegComply, RegLearn), integration architecture design, API specifications for core banking and KYC, change control framework, semi-annual audit schedule

phases.title: System Deployment & Configuration
phases.objectives: Deploy and configure full AML platform across all functions.
phases.key_deliverables: Transaction monitoring deployment (RegPort), fraud monitoring deployment (RegGuard), case management deployment (RegComply), risk assessment engine, regulatory reporting automation, real-time dashboards, staff training via RegLearn

phases.title: Assurance & Examination Readiness
phases.objectives: Validate controls and prepare evidence pack for CBN examination.
phases.key_deliverables: Semi-annual AML internal audit, MFA and encryption evidence, NDPA compliance documentation, immutable audit trail validation, evidence pack for 12 standards, board reporting on compliance status

support_section.intro_paragraph: OPEX Consulting and RegTech365 provide end-to-end support for Sunrise MFB's compliance journey from roadmap submission to examination readiness.
support_section.advisory_intro: OPEX Consulting delivers six core advisory services for MFB compliance:

products.name: RegPort
products.function: Transaction monitoring, sanctions/PEP screening, risk assessment, regulatory reporting
products.relevance_to_client: Addresses 8 Critical Gaps for Sunrise MFB. Real-time monitoring for deposits, loans, and FX/remittance. Automates goAML/NFIU reporting for cross-border transactions.

products.name: RegGuard
products.relevance_to_client: Critical for Sunrise MFB's mobile app and USSD channels. Detects fraud patterns across branch, digital, and agent networks in real time.

products.name: RegComply
products.function: Enterprise case management, audit trail, governance logs, management reporting
products.relevance_to_client: Provides Maker-Checker workflow, immutable audit trail, and real-time dashboards. Closes 3 Critical Gaps for case management, audit, and reporting.

products.name: RegLearn
products.relevance_to_client: Delivers documented training records for staff handling deposits, loans, and FX. Addresses governance gap and supports CBN examination readiness.

advisory_services: CBN roadmap template completion and submission
AML/CFT/CPF policy drafting and board presentation
MLRO/CCO appointment advisory and role definition
Evidence pack preparation for CBN examination readiness
ISO/IEC 27001 and 42001 alignment for Section 6 AI governance
Agent network AML controls review and framework
support_section.next_steps_box: Contact OPEX Consulting to schedule roadmap workshop and platform demonstration. Immediate action required to meet 10 June 2026 deadline.
